pi_items.verified_value: Nx Witness VMS version 5.1.5.39242 or 6.0.1.39873 from Network Optix
pi_items.source: install_nx_witness.sh lines 41-43 specify real versions from https://updates.networkoptix.com/default/. Web search confirms Nx Witness is a legitimate, well-documented IP video management system with REST API supporting PATCH /rest/v1/devices/{id} for camera configuration.

pi_items.metadata_value: Camera API supports 'motionType' parameter with values 'software' and 'default'
pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed. Nx Witness supports hardware motion detection and software-side motion detection. Task uses 'software' and 'default' values for motionType parameter.
pi_items.source: Web search on Nx Witness motion detection confirms both hardware and software detection types exist. setup_task.sh lines 45-58 use JSON payload with 'motionType': 'default'

pi_items.metadata_value: Camera recording schedule supports 'recordingType' with values 'motionOnly' and 'always'
pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed. Nx Witness recording schedule supports 'motionOnly' (motion-triggered recording) and 'always' (continuous recording).
pi_items.source: Web search confirms Nx Witness recording schedule options include Motion Only and always recording. setup_task.sh lines 48-58 use JSON with 'recordingType': 'always' in default schedule

pi_items.metadata_value: Five virtual test cameras created by testcamera tool
pi_items.verified_value: Five synthetic cameras created: testcamera tool (setup_nx_witness.sh lines 140-163) creates virtual RTSP cameras from test video file or live test signal
pi_items.source: setup_nx_witness.sh lines 128-163 invoke testcamera with video file or live test channels, then renamed to Parking Lot, Entrance, Server Room, Lobby, Loading Dock

privileged_info_summary: The task configures motion detection on Nx Witness VMS, a real video management system from Network Optix using REST API version 5.1.5.39242 or 6.0.1.39873. The environment creates five synthetic virtual cameras via the testcamera tool and names them: Parking Lot Camera, Entrance Camera, Server Room Camera, Lobby Camera, and Loading Dock Camera. The system supports two motion detection types: hardware-based (designated 'default') and software-based (designated 'software'). Recording schedules support two recording types: 'always' for continuous recording and 'motionOnly' for motion-triggered recording. The API endpoint is https://localhost:7001 with admin credentials (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). The task requires configuring three target cameras (Entrance, Server Room, Loading Dock) to use software motion detection with motion-only recording, while preserving two other cameras (Parking Lot, Lobby) with default hardware detection and continuous recording. The agent must generate a JSON configuration report at /home/ga/motion_detection_config.json reflecting the state of all five cameras.
